hub.title: Settings
hub.description: Configuration for your business and the surfaces you use day to day. Pick a card to dive in.
hub.systemSectionHint: Read-only / debug surfaces for whoever runs this Shyre instance. Most users will never need these.

business.title: Business
business.description: Legal identity, fiscal year, default rates, brand.

members.title: Members & invites
members.description: Invite teammates, change roles, revoke access. The most-frequent owner task — surfaced first.

securityGroups.title: Security Groups
securityGroups.description: Role-based access groups for shared resources.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Time-entry category sets — the primary organizing axis for time.

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Reusable project + description + billable shortcuts for the timer.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Personal access tokens for agents and external tools. Off by default.

import.title: Import
import.description: Pull data in from Harvest or CSV.

errorLog.title: Error log
errorLog.description: Unresolved runtime errors captured across the instance.

users.title: All accounts
users.description: Every signed-up account on this instance and its system-admin status.

allTeams.title: Instance teams roster
allTeams.description: Read-only audit view of every team on this instance, including teams you're not a member of.

sampleData.title: Sample data tool
sampleData.description: Dev-only: seed or wipe demo customers, projects, and entries.

deploy.title: Deployment
deploy.description: Connect Vercel and provision instance secrets (encryption key, webhook secret) without leaving Shyre.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.description: Every API token + key Shyre tracks, with rotate-by status. Banner on the dashboard surfaces anything expiring soon.

credentialsPage.title: Credentials
credentialsPage.description: Every API token and key Shyre tracks across this instance. Sorted by urgency — expired first. Click any row to jump to the form that rotates it.
credentialsPage.emptyAfter: to connect Vercel and provision the encryption key.
credentialsPage.noRotateDate: No rotate-by date set — pick one to enable reminders

expiry.expiredAgo: {count, plural, one {expired # day ago} other {expired # days ago}}
expiry.untilExpiry: {count, plural, one {# day until expiry} other {# days until expiry}}
